    public class TestMybatis {    public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {        //指定全局文件        String resource="mybatis_config.xml";        //读取配置文件        InputStream is= Resources.getResourceAsStream(resource);        //构建session factory        SqlSessionFactory ssf=new SqlSessionFactoryBuilder().build(is);        try(SqlSession sqlSession=ssf.openSession();){            System.out.println(sqlSession.toString());            User user1=sqlSession.selectOne("mymapper.selectUser",3);            System.out.println(user1);        }    }}

    2.CRUD

  • 新建一个接口UserDao
    public interface UserDao {    public User queryUserById(String id);    public List<User> queryAllUsers();    public void insertUser(User u);    public void deleteUser(String id);    public void updateUser(User u);}
  • 新建一个映射的配置文件UserDaoMapper.xml
    <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?><!DOCTYPE mapper        PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd"><mapper namespace="userdao"><!--    查询因为有结果集，要制定返回类型--><!--    #{id}里面的名字任意，只要保证唯一-->    <select id="queryUserById" resultType="com.kaidow.mybatis.User">        select * from tb_user where id= #{id}    </select>    <select id="queryAllUsers" resultType="com.kaidow.mybatis.User">        select * from tb_user    </select>    <insert id="insertUser" >        insert into tb_user(        id,        username,        password,        age,        sex,        birthday,        created,        updated        )        values (        #{id},        #{username},        #{password},        #{age},        #{sex},        #{birthday},        now(),        now()        );    </insert><!--    suffixoverride去除多余的后缀，也就是最后一个“，”-->    <update id="updateUser" >        update tb_user        <!-- 这里也可以用set标签 --!>        <trim prefix="set" suffixOverrides=",">            <if test="username!=null">username=#{username},</if>            <if test="password!=null">password=#{password},</if>            <if test="age!=null">age=#{age},</if>            <if test="sex!=null">sex=#{sex},</if>            <if test="birthday!=null">birthday=#{birthday},</if>            created=now(),            updated=now()        </trim>        <where>            id=#{id}        </where>    </update>    <delete id="deleteUser" >        delete from tb_user where id=#{id};    </delete></mapper>
  • 创建一个实现类UserDaoImpl   这里如果报错Mapped Statement collection does not contain value for mapper很可能是参数列表里的命名空间.id与mapperxml文件里的不一致
    public class UserDaoImpl implements UserDao{    private SqlSession sqlSession;    public UserDaoImpl(SqlSession sqlSession) {        this.sqlSession = sqlSession;    }    @Override    public User queryUserById(String id) {        return this.sqlSession.selectOne("userdao.queryUserById",id);    }    @Override    public List<User> queryAllUsers() {        return this.sqlSession.selectList("userdao.queryAllUsers");    }    @Override    public void insertUser(User u) {        this.sqlSession.insert("userdao.insertUser",u);    }    @Override    public void deleteUser(String id) {        sqlSession.delete("userdao.deleteUser",id);    }    @Override    public void updateUser(User u) {        sqlSession.update("userdao.updateUser",u);    }}
  • 对UserDao创建junit测试，自动生成各个方法的测试代码体  这里selectOne方法如果查询返回多个结果会报错，sqlsession不传给当前对象会报空指针异常，查询时不需要提交的，增删改是需要提交事务的。
    public class UserDaoTest {    public UserDao userDao;    public SqlSession sqlSession;    @Before    public void setUp() throws Exception {        String resource="mybatis_config.xml";        InputStream is=Resources.getResourceAsStream(resource);        SqlSessionFactory sqlSessionFactory= new SqlSessionFactoryBuilder().build(is);        this.sqlSession= sqlSessionFactory.openSession();        this.userDao=new UserDaoImpl(sqlSession);        System.out.println("setup"+this.sqlSession.toString());    }    @Test    public void queryUserById() {        System.out.println(this.sqlSession.toString());        User user=userDao.queryUserById("1");        System.out.println(user);    }    @Test    public void queryAllUsers() {        System.out.println(this.sqlSession.toString());        List<User> list=userDao.queryAllUsers();        for(User u:list){            System.out.println(u);        }    }    @Test    public void insertUser() {        System.out.println(this.sqlSession.toString());        User u=new User();        u.setId("4");        u.setUserName("zeus");        u.setPassword("123");        u.setAge(21);        u.setSex(1);        userDao.insertUser(u);        this.sqlSession.commit();    }    @Test    public void deleteUser() {        userDao.deleteUser("4");        this.sqlSession.commit();    }    @Test    public void updateUser() {        User u=new User();        u.setId("4");        u.setUserName("zeus");        u.setPassword("1234");        u.setAge(22);        u.setBirthday("1999-1-1");        userDao.updateUser(u);        this.sqlSession.commit();    }}

    3.模糊查询与多条件查询

    <!--%表示任意字符，#{0}里面的id任意取-->    <select id="matchSelect" parameterType="string" resultType="com.kaidow.mybatis.User">        select * from tb_user where username like concat('%',#{0},'%')    </select><!--这里参数是两个不同类型的，用map-->    <select id="multiConditionSelect" parameterType="map" resultType="com.kaidow.mybatis.User">        select * from tb_user where username like concat('%',#{name},'%') and age>#{age}    </select>

4.一对多

我又新建了一个Product类和Category类，一个种类可以对应多个产品，这里感觉有点重复工作，早知道刚开始就用Category了，whatever了，反正也只是一个演示。数据库中新建表category（id,name)和表product(id,name,price,cid)。

  • Category类中的属性
    private int id;private  String name;private List<Product> products;
  • Product类中的属性
    private int id;private String name;private float price;private int cid;
  • 新建映射文件category.xml
    <mapper namespace="category">    <!-- id唯一标识，type为映射的pojo对象-->    <resultMap id="CategoryBean" type="com.kaidow.mybatis.pojo.Category"><!--        id column为表中主键字段，property为pojo中对应的属性名-->        <id column="cid" property="id"/>        <result column="cname" property="name"/>        <collection property="products" ofType="com.kaidow.mybatis.pojo.Product">            <id column="pid" property="id"/>            <result column="pname" property="name"/>            <result column="price" property="price"/>        </collection>    </resultMap><!--    表的列名要重新命名与上面的column一致，从而与pojo中的属性对应-->    <select id="listCategory" resultMap="CategoryBean">        select c.*,p.* ,c.id cid,c.name cname,p.id pid,p.name pname        from ssmdemo.category c left join product p on c.id = p.cid    </select></mapper>

5.多对一

多个product可以对应一个category，那么product类中就要有一个category属性，从而可以根据每个product得到对应的category

  • product类中添加category属性
    private int id;    private String name;    private float price;    private Category category;//添加的category
  • 新建product.xml,通过product2category的select标签配置sql语句，通过resultmap返回查询的结果集，进行字段与属性的对应
    <resultMap id="productBean" type="com.kaidow.mybatis.pojo.Product">        <id column="pid" property="id"/>        <result column="pname" property="name"/>        <result column="price" property="price"/>        <association property="category" javaType="com.kaidow.mybatis.pojo.Category">            <id column="cid" property="id"/>            <result column="cname" property="name"/>        </association>    </resultMap>    <select id="product2category" resultMap="productBean">        select p.*,c.*,p.id pid,p.name pname,c.id cid,c.name cname        from product p left join category c on p.cid=c.id    </select>
  • 在mybatis_config.xml中添加映射
    <mapper resource="mappers/Product.xml"/>

    6.多对多

    为了测试多对多，需要换一种情境。订单Order类，一个订单有多个订单项OrderItem，每一个订单项对应一种订单产品Product。因而，一个订单可以对应多个产品，一个产品也可以对应多个订单，也就是一个产品可以在多个订单中出现。
  • 创建表Order(id,code),表OrderItem(id,oid,pid,number):订单有订单号和订单代码，订单项有订单项号，订单号，产品号和产品数量,product表之前已经建好了
    create table tb_order (  id int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,  code varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL,  PRIMARY KEY (id)) ENGINE=MyISAM AUTO_INCREMENT=1 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; create table order_item_(  id int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,   oid int ,  pid int ,  number int ,  PRIMARY KEY(id))AUTO_INCREMENT=1 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
  • 插入一些数据用于测试
    INSERT INTO order_ VALUES (1,'code000A');INSERT INTO order_ VALUES (2,'code000B'); INSERT INTO order_item_ VALUES (null, 1, 1, 100);INSERT INTO order_item_ VALUES (null, 1, 2, 100);INSERT INTO order_item_ VALUES (null, 1, 3, 100);INSERT INTO order_item_ VALUES (null, 2, 2, 100);INSERT INTO order_item_ VALUES (null, 2, 3, 100);INSERT INTO order_item_ VALUES (null, 2, 4, 100);
  • 创建实体类Order和OrderItem，我只列出属性，setter和getter以及toString和空参构造函数自动生成
    public class Order{    private int id;    private String code;    private List<OrderItem> orderItems;}
    public class OrderItem{     private int id;    private Product product;    private Order order;    private int number;}
  • xml文件的配置order.xml,orderitem.xml
    <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?><!DOCTYPE mapper        PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd"><mapper namespace="order">    <resultMap id="orderBean" type="com.kaidow.mybatis.pojo.Order">        <id column="orderid" property="id"/>        <result column="code" property="code"/>        <collection property="orderItems" ofType="com.kaidow.mybatis.pojo.OrderItem">            <id column="itemid" property="id"/>            <result column="number" property="number"/>            <association property="product" javaType="com.kaidow.mybatis.pojo.Product">                <id column="pid" property="id"/>                <result column="pname" property="name"/>                <result column="price" property="price"/>            </association>        </collection>    </resultMap>    <select id="listOrder" resultMap="orderBean">        select item.*,o.*,p.*, item.id itemid,o.id orderid,p.id pid,p.name pname        from order_item item left join tb_order o on item.oid=o.id        left join product p on item.pid=p.id    </select></mapper>
    <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?><!DOCTYPE mapper        PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd"><mapper namespace="orderItem">    <insert id="insertItem" parameterType="com.kaidow.mybatis.pojo.OrderItem">        insert into order_item        values (null,#{order.id},#{product.id},#{number})    </insert></mapper>
  • mybatis_config.xml中添加mapper的映射
    <mapper resource="mappers/Order.xml"/><mapper resource="mappers/OrderItem.xml"/>
    ` 测试类
    String resource="mybatis_config.xml";        InputStream is= Resources.getResourceAsStream(resource);        SqlSessionFactory sqlSessionFactory=new SqlSessionFactoryBuilder().build(is);        try(SqlSession sqlSession=sqlSessionFactory.openSession()){            List<Order> orders=sqlSession.selectList("order.listOrder");            for(Order order:orders){                System.out.println(order);                List<OrderItem> items=order.getOrderItems();                for(OrderItem orderItem: items ){                    System.out.println(orderItem);                }            }
